timeline.title: Sent by School
timeline.description: The school or support service has submitted the referral to the healthcare clinic.

timeline.title: Received by Clinic
timeline.description: The clinic has received the referral and registered it in the system.

timeline.title: Reviewed by Specialist
timeline.description: A clinician reviews the referral to determine the next steps.

timeline.title: Waiting for Assessment
timeline.description: The referral has been accepted and the child has been placed on the waiting list.

timeline.title: Assessment Booked
timeline.description: An appointment date has been scheduled.

timeline.title: Assessment Completed
timeline.description: The appointment has taken place and the specialist has completed the assessment.

timeline.title: Support Plan
timeline.description: A support plan is prepared after the assessment.

timeline.title: Referral Closed
timeline.description: The referral process has been completed.
